case_title: PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. VS. TABITHA HART

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SC-225 ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS MAILED TO TABITHA HART ON 6/5/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,666.67 FILED BY PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE PAYMENT ORDER IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS ARE OWING ON THE JUDGMENT AS OF JUNE 5, 2019: PRINCIPAL BALANCE OF JUDGMENT AND COSTS INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,841.67 AND INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $187.53.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 SERVED OCT-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT (SC-223). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICOLAS CARLIN. DEFENDANT TABITHA HART IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS UPDATE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS,ERIEWINE, GIVEN & CARLIN LLP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA $4,666.67 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,841.67, PAYABLE IN INSTALLMENTS OF $250 PER MONTH. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT CONTRACTED FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND 4666.67 IS THE AMOUNT DEFENDANT OWES PURSUANT TO THAT CONTRACT. COST REDUCED TO REFLECT EXCESSIVE SERVICE COST. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEB-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $187.53 ACCRUED INTEREST, $200.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT HART, TABITHA
